steps.title: Translate calories per pound into an expression with the weight variable
steps.content: The phrase 30 calories per pound of the guinea pig's weight tells us to multiply the weight by 30. If the guinea pig weighs $x$ pounds, this contributes $30x$ calories to the daily intake.

steps.title: Add the constant and write the equation
steps.content: The phrase plus an additional 9 calories adds a constant term. Combining both parts, the total recommended calories is: $$c=30x+9$$ D is correct.
